reasons: Candidate worktrees exposed both the intended active skill and evals/smoke/SMOKE-20260612-01/candidate_skill/SKILL.md as discoverable skills with the same name.
The baseline worktree disabled the entire skill tree and therefore did not receive the duplicate entry.
The two conditions were not identical except for the intended candidate overlay.
usable_evidence: Raw rollout traces, timing, token use, file invariance, and actual active-skill/reference reads.
Diagnostic evidence that candidate v1 improved section reads but still exceeded the standard reference budget.
Diagnostic evidence that E06 only partially improved multi-agent assessment and E36 still missed it.
